action.content: Write a persuasive email to a teenager who lives in Aberdeen, Scotland. The main point is to encourage them to volunteer at a local soup kitchen. At least 5 words in the output should be in all caps.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Make a REAL difference in Aberdeen today!

Hi there,

I know life in Aberdeen can get busy with school, friends, and the ever-changing weather, but I wanted to share something that could change your perspective. Have you ever thought about volunteering at a local soup kitchen?

It might sound intimidating, but it is actually an AMAZING way to connect with your community. You don't need any special skills, just a willing heart. By stepping up, you are showing that you CARE about your neighbors who are struggling right now.

Imagine the impact you could have. One hour of your time can provide a warm meal and a friendly face to someone who needs it most. This isn't just about food; it's about building a STRONGER Aberdeen together. Plus, it looks fantastic on your CV and helps you develop skills you can't learn in a classroom.

Don't wait for the perfect moment; the time is NOW. Reach out to a local charity today and see how you can get involved. Your actions can be the spark that changes a life.

Let's make a difference TOGETHER!

Best regards,

A Friend
action.label: response
